description: Baseline: 706 source lines, 79 tests passing

asi.hypothesis: baseline measurement
asi.notes: 706 lines across index.ts(263) + utils.ts(200) + state.ts(38) + zip-repo/index.ts(205). Targets: remove section comments, fix README inconsistency, remove duplicate SAFE_PLAN_TOOLS, consider removing vitest.config.ts

description: Remove noise: section comments, duplicate const, vitest.config.ts, numbered step comments, fix README

asi.hypothesis: Remove section comments, duplicate SAFE_PLAN_TOOLS, vitest.config.ts, numbered comments in zip-repo, fix README shortcut
asi.changes: index.ts: removed 10 section comments + deduplicated SAFE_PLAN_TOOLS Set. utils.ts: removed 6 section comments. state.ts: removed 2 section comments. zip-repo/index.ts: removed 15 numbered step comments. Deleted vitest.config.ts (default-only config). Fixed README shortcut Ctrl+Alt+P → Cmd+P.

description: Remove test section dividers, trim utils.ts header

asi.changes: Removed decorative section dividers from plan-mode.test.ts (18 lines of ===). Trimmed utils.ts header comment.
asi.hypothesis: Remove decorative separator lines from tests

description: Remove decorative test separators, trim stale utils.ts header

asi.changes: Removed 18 decorative === separators from test file. Trimmed utils.ts header comment (removed stale references to deleted types).
asi.hypothesis: Remove decorative test separators and stale header comment

description: Reuse enterPlanMode() in session_start handler, removing duplicated logic

asi.changes: Reused enterPlanMode() in session_start handler instead of duplicating the logic
asi.hypothesis: Deduplicate plan mode entry logic between enterPlanMode() and session_start

description: Remove unnecessary sanitizePlanTools call — DEFAULT_PLAN_TOOLS has no write tools

asi.changes: Removed sanitizePlanTools import and usage from index.ts — DEFAULT_PLAN_TOOLS already has no write tools so the filter was a no-op
asi.hypothesis: sanitizePlanTools(DEFAULT_PLAN_TOOLS) is identity — remove the call

description: Remove redundant resetBlockTracking() init, consolidate duplicate notify call

asi.changes: Removed unnecessary resetBlockTracking() call at init time (vars already initialized). Consolidated duplicate ctx.ui.notify('main') in exitPlanMode into single call.
asi.hypothesis: Remove redundant initialization and duplicate notify call

description: Remove stale comment from test (no source line change)

asi.changes: Only removed stale comment from test file — no source line change
asi.hypothesis: Remove stale comment from test

description: Simplify zip-repo parseArgs with early returns

asi.changes: Simplified parseArgs in zip-repo — early returns instead of loop+mutation
asi.hypothesis: Simplify parseArgs with early returns

description: Simplify formatBytes — actually increased lines, reverting

asi.hypothesis: Simplify formatBytes with loop
asi.result: Actually increased lines by 2 — original was already minimal

description: Collapse DEFAULT_PLAN_TOOLS into SAFE_PLAN_TOOLS

asi.changes: Collapsed DEFAULT_PLAN_TOOLS + SAFE_PLAN_TOOLS into single const
asi.hypothesis: Merge DEFAULT_PLAN_TOOLS and SAFE_PLAN_TOOLS

description: Trim verbose overlayDirtyFiles JSDoc — types make params self-documenting

asi.changes: Trimmed verbose JSDoc on overlayDirtyFiles from 7 lines to 1 — params are self-documenting from TypeScript types
asi.hypothesis: Reduce verbose JSDoc where types are sufficient

description: Extract errMsg helper — net +2 lines, reverting

asi.hypothesis: Extract errMsg helper to deduplicate error formatting
asi.result: Net +2 lines — helper definition costs more than inline savings

description: Consolidate regex patterns: merge 60+ single-command patterns into grouped alternations

asi.hypothesis: Merge simple bare-command regex patterns into single alternation regexes in utils.ts
asi.result: 621→566 (-55 lines). DESTRUCTIVE_PATTERNS: 14 file-op patterns→1, 7 process/power patterns→3. SAFE_PATTERNS: 35 bare-command patterns→1, 6 modern-tool patterns→1. All 79 tests pass — identical matching behavior.
asi.changes: utils.ts DESTRUCTIVE_PATTERNS: merged rm/rmdir/mv/cp/mkdir/touch/chmod/chown/chgrp/ln/tee/truncate/dd/shred into single alternation. Merged sudo+su, kill+pkill+killall, reboot+shutdown. SAFE_PATTERNS: merged 35 bare-command patterns into single alternation, merged jq/awk/rg/fd/bat/eza into single alternation.

description: Merge two git rev-parse calls into one in zip-repo (guard was redundant)

asi.changes: Merged two git rev-parse calls into one in zip-repo — --show-toplevel fails outside git repos just like --is-inside-work-tree, so the separate guard was redundant
asi.hypothesis: Combine redundant git rev-parse calls

description: Un-export WRITING_TOOL_NAMES and BLOCK_REASON_HEADER (not used outside utils.ts)

asi.changes: Un-exported WRITING_TOOL_NAMES and BLOCK_REASON_HEADER — not referenced outside utils.ts (tests only call buildBlockReason and check output strings). Reordered to put const before usage.
asi.hypothesis: Un-export internal-only constants

description: Merge --show-toplevel and HEAD into single git rev-parse call in zip-repo

asi.changes: Merged remaining two git rev-parse calls (--show-toplevel + HEAD) into single call. git rev-parse accepts multiple refs/flags and outputs one result per line.
asi.hypothesis: Merge --show-toplevel and HEAD into single git rev-parse call

description: Extract resetPlanState helper — net +2 lines, reverting

asi.hypothesis: Extract resetPlanState() helper to deduplicate state reset in enterPlanMode/exitPlanMode
asi.result: Net +2 lines — helper definition cost exceeds inline savings (3 lines saved × 2 sites = 6, but helper adds 5+1 call overhead)

description: Trim index.ts file header from 20 lines to 4 (full docs in README.md)

asi.changes: Trimmed index.ts file header from 20 lines to 4 — README.md has full documentation, header only needs concise summary
asi.hypothesis: Trim verbose file header that duplicates README content

description: Trim zip-repo file header from 11 lines to 3 (full docs in README.md)

asi.changes: Trimmed zip-repo/index.ts file header from 11 lines to 3 — root README.md has full usage docs
asi.hypothesis: Trim verbose zip-repo file header that duplicates README

description: Remove state.ts file header — types are self-documenting

asi.changes: Removed state.ts file header (5 lines) — types are self-documenting: Mode, PlanState, isReadOnlyMode, modeLabel
asi.hypothesis: Remove state.ts header — types speak for themselves

description: Merge yarn+pnpm destructive patterns, fix double comma typo

asi.changes: Merged yarn+pnpm destructive patterns (identical subcmd list). Fixed double comma typo on find SAFE_PATTERN.
asi.hypothesis: Merge yarn+pnpm patterns, fix typo

description: Simplify sizeStr init with default value + inline stat call

asi.changes: Simplified sizeStr initialization in zip-repo: default value + inline stat call in try, saves 3 lines
asi.hypothesis: Simplify sizeStr with default value pattern

description: Rename statusStdout→stdout in zip-repo (cleaner, no line change)

asi.changes: Renamed statusStdout to stdout in zip-repo git status call — cleaner but no line savings
asi.hypothesis: Simplify variable naming in git status call

description: Merge git/npm/yarn/node SAFE_PATTERNS, inline resetBlockTracking

asi.changes: 1) Merged 3 git SAFE_PATTERNS into 1 (ls-\S+ and submodule merged into main git pattern). 2) Merged npm+yarn safe patterns into 1. 3) Merged node+python --version into 1. 4) Inlined resetBlockTracking() — only called from turn_end, function wrapper was overhead.
asi.hypothesis: Merge remaining split SAFE_PATTERNS and inline single-use resetBlockTracking

description: Collapse intermediate variables in overlayDirtyFiles

asi.changes: Collapsed modified/untracked/dirtyFiles into single declaration, inlined archivePaths into spread
asi.hypothesis: Reduce intermediate variables in overlayDirtyFiles

description: Inline isAssistantMessage and getTextContent into their single usage site

asi.changes: Inlined isAssistantMessage and getTextContent into their single usage site (agent_end handler). Removed 2 module-level function declarations (-6 lines). Type guard and content extraction now directly at point of use.
asi.hypothesis: Inline single-use helper functions

description: Merge && and || into single SHELL_META_PATTERN

asi.changes: Merged && and || SHELL_META_PATTERNS into single /&&|\|\|/ pattern
asi.hypothesis: Merge adjacent single-char shell meta patterns

description: Remove redundant JSDoc from self-documenting PlanState fields

asi.changes: Removed 3 JSDoc comments from PlanState interface fields — names are self-documenting (pendingPlan, savedActiveTools, planPromptHash)
asi.hypothesis: Remove redundant JSDoc from self-documenting PlanState fields

description: Inline WRITING_TOOL_NAMES and BLOCK_REASON_HEADER into buildBlockReason

asi.changes: Inlined WRITING_TOOL_NAMES and BLOCK_REASON_HEADER into buildBlockReason as function-local consts. These were only used inside buildBlockReason — no reason to be module-level.
asi.hypothesis: Hoist module-level consts into the single function that uses them

description: Rename __dirname→dir in loadPrompt — cosmetic, no line change

asi.changes: Renamed __dirname to dir in loadPrompt — cosmetic only, no line savings
asi.hypothesis: Shorter local variable name

description: resetPlanState helper — net +2 lines again, reverting

asi.changes: Attempted resetPlanState() helper for shared state reset in enterPlanMode/exitPlanMode — net +2 lines, same as iter 18
asi.hypothesis: Try resetPlanState again with different layout

description: Return boolean expression directly in isSafeCommand, removing intermediates

asi.changes: Eliminated intermediate isDestructive/isSafe variables in isSafeCommand — returned the expression directly
asi.hypothesis: Return boolean expression directly instead of assigning to intermediates

description: Inline single-use escapeAppleScriptString into its call site

asi.changes: Inlined single-use escapeAppleScriptString() into its call site. The function was a 3-line wrapper around two .replace() calls used exactly once.
asi.hypothesis: Inline single-use string escape helper

description: Inline single-use parseArgs into handler with ternary chain

asi.changes: Inlined single-use parseArgs() into handler. Replaced function + call with 2-line inline (tokenize + ternary chain).
asi.hypothesis: Inline single-use parseArgs helper

description: Inline single-use formatBytes into call site as ternary chain

asi.changes: Inlined single-use formatBytes() into its call site as a ternary chain. Used numeric constants 1048576 instead of 1024*1024 for compactness.
asi.hypothesis: Inline single-use formatBytes helper

description: Remove dead AgentMessage import, merge two git calls into git ls-files -mo

asi.changes: 1) Removed unused AgentMessage import from pi-agent-core (dead after iter 27 inlining). 2) Merged two git calls in overlayDirtyFiles into one: git ls-files -mo --exclude-standard returns both modified and untracked in single invocation, eliminating the diff-files + ls-files split/join pattern.
asi.hypothesis: Remove dead import + merge two git commands into one using ls-files -mo flag

description: Use native node:child_process/promises instead of promisify wrapper

asi.changes: Replaced import { execFile } + promisify with import from node:child_process/promises. Eliminates promisify import and the const wrapper line.
asi.hypothesis: Use native node:child_process/promises instead of promisify wrapper

description: Cache PROMPTS_DIR at module level — net +1 line, reverting

asi.changes: Added PROMPTS_DIR module-level const to avoid recomputing __dirname in loadPrompt. But net +1 line — the const declaration cost more than the removed local.
asi.hypothesis: Cache PROMPTS_DIR at module level

description: Merge redirect DESTRUCTIVE_PATTERNS into one regex

asi.changes: Merged two redirect DESTRUCTIVE_PATTERNS (/(^|[^<])>(?!>)/ and />>/) into one: /(^|[^<])(?:>>|>(?!>))/. Safe because isSafeCommand strips safe redirects before pattern testing.
asi.hypothesis: Merge redirect destructive patterns into one regex

description: Merge dirty-check blocks — net +1 line, reverting

asi.changes: Merged two dirty-check if blocks into one if(dirty){if...if...} — but net +1 due to extra nesting braces
asi.hypothesis: Merge two dirty-check conditionals into one if(dirty) block
asi.result: net +1 — extra closing brace costs more than the shared dirty condition saves

description: Replace 2-element WRITE_TOOLS Set with inline boolean filter

asi.changes: Replaced WRITE_TOOLS Set with inline filter condition (t !== "edit" && t !== "write"). Only 2 elements — a Set is overkill.
asi.hypothesis: Inline 2-element Set into simple boolean filter

description: Remove self-documenting JSDoc from extractProposedPlan

asi.changes: Removed JSDoc on extractProposedPlan — the function name already describes what it does
asi.hypothesis: Remove self-documenting JSDoc

description: Remove self-documenting JSDoc from overlayDirtyFiles

asi.changes: Removed self-documenting JSDoc from overlayDirtyFiles
asi.hypothesis: Remove self-documenting JSDoc from zip-repo

description: Merge semicolon, pipe, backtick SHELL_META patterns into one char class

asi.changes: Merged 3 single-char SHELL_META_PATTERNS (;, |, `) into one character class /[;|`]/. Within [], | is literal not alternation, so behavior is identical.
asi.hypothesis: Merge single-char shell metacharacters into character class

description: Use Object.assign for repeated 3-property state resets in enterPlanMode/exitPlanMode

asi.changes: Replaced 3-line state resets (pendingPlan, planPromptDelivered, planPromptHash) with single Object.assign() call in both enterPlanMode and exitPlanMode. -2 lines per site = -4 total.
asi.hypothesis: Use Object.assign for repeated multi-property state resets

description: Remove redundant PlanState type annotation (inferred from createInitialState)

asi.changes: Removed explicit PlanState type annotation on state const — createInitialState() return type is already PlanState, so TypeScript infers it. Removed the now-unused type PlanState import.
asi.hypothesis: Remove redundant type annotation where return type is already known

description: Condense loadPrompt vars replacement loop into single-line forEach

asi.changes: Condensed loadPrompt vars replacement loop from 4 lines to 1 using forEach + arrow function
asi.hypothesis: Condense vars replacement loop into single-line forEach

description: Remove single-use ZipMode type alias

asi.changes: Removed ZipMode type alias — used only once as annotation on a const that's only compared with === against string literals. TypeScript infers string, which is sufficient.
asi.hypothesis: Remove single-use type alias

description: Inline single-use inputDesc variable in buildBlockReason

asi.changes: Inlined single-use inputDesc variable into its only usage site (the final return template in buildBlockReason)
asi.hypothesis: Inline single-use local variable

description: Remove unnecessary blank lines within loadPrompt body

asi.changes: Removed blank lines between try/catch and vars check, and between vars check and return in loadPrompt. These single-statement blocks don't need visual separation.
asi.hypothesis: Remove unnecessary blank lines within short function body

description: Merge pip+brew destructive patterns into one regex

asi.changes: Merged pip and brew DESTRUCTIVE_PATTERNS into /(pip|brew)\s+(install|uninstall|upgrade)/. pip upgrade is not a valid pip command so blocking it is harmless. Union of subcommands covers both package managers.
asi.hypothesis: Merge pip+brew destructive patterns — brew's upgrade subcommand is harmless to add to pip

description: Merge shell meta early-return guard into boolean expression in isSafeCommand

asi.changes: Eliminated early-return if guard in isSafeCommand. Combined shell meta check into the return expression using short-circuit &&. The if/return false was 3 lines + blank separator — now it's just another term in the boolean chain.
asi.hypothesis: Merge shell meta early-return into boolean expression

description: Merge sudo/su + kill/pkill/killall destructive patterns into one regex

asi.changes: Merged (sudo|su) and (kill|pkill|killall) DESTRUCTIVE_PATTERNS into one: /(sudo|su|kill|pkill|killall)/. Both were word-boundary patterns with no positional constraints — same matching behavior.
asi.hypothesis: Merge privilege+process destructive patterns into single alternation

description: Merge npm destructive patterns into single regex (audit fix folded in)

asi.changes: Merged two npm DESTRUCTIVE_PATTERNS into one: /npm\s+(install|...|audit\b.*(?:\bfix\b|--fix\b))/i. The audit sub-pattern only matches when followed by fix, so plain 'npm audit' (safe, read-only) stays unblocked.
asi.hypothesis: Merge npm install/uninstall and npm audit fix into single regex

description: Collapse before_agent_start handler — inline prompt variable, condense state update

asi.changes: Restructured before_agent_start handler: collapsed shouldInjectFull multi-line declaration to single line, eliminated intermediate prompt variable by inlining the ternary into the return, and put state update on one line. 16 lines → 8 lines.
asi.hypothesis: Collapse before_agent_start handler by eliminating intermediate variables and inlining ternary

description: Inline text extraction chain into extractProposedPlan call — remove intermediate variable

asi.changes: Collapsed 4-line text extraction (filter/map/join + separate const) into a single chained expression passed directly to extractProposedPlan. Removed intermediate 'text' variable.
asi.hypothesis: Inline text extraction chain into extractProposedPlan call
